name: observablehq-mcp
description: Local MCP server for reading and editing Observable notebooks through Observable's internal API.

interface.shortDescription: Read and edit Observable notebooks directly.
interface.longDescription: Local MCP server that reads notebook cells and applies direct edits through Observable's internal document and websocket APIs.
defaultPrompt: List the cells in this Observable notebook.
Read the cell named mapaViz from this notebook.
Apply a targeted code change to an Observable cell.
